# Silver Swap

> Silver Swap is a non-custodial concentrated-liquidity DEX on Sonic — swap tokens, provide ranged liquidity, and farm from your own wallet.

## Key facts
- Type: AMM / DEX
- Networks: Sonic mainnet (EVM, chain ID 146)
- Custody: Non-custodial — your wallet signs
- Costs: Pool fee + network gas + price impact
- Token in/out: the pair you choose
- Verify: Check the pool and contract in the live app
